Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

Class AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,T>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<S,T>
Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Implemented Interfaces:
ExtensibleComparableValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,T>, ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<S,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp, SizeValidatorNoOp
public abstract class AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp<S,T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractObjectValidatorNoOp<S,T> implements ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<S,T>, ExtensibleNumberValidator<S,T>
An ExtensiblePrimitiveNumberValidator that does nothing. A validator that ignores all subsequent failures because they are guaranteed to fail and would add any value to the end-user. For example, an attempt was made to dereference null or cast the value to an incompatible type.
